001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception;
002
003/**
004 * Exception thrown when a user attempts to access a resource they don't have permission for.
005 */
006public class AccessDeniedException extends RuntimeException {
007
008  /**
009   * Creates an instance with no detail message.
010   */
011  public AccessDeniedException() {
012    super();
013  }
014
015  /**
016   * Creates an instance with a detail message.
017   *
018   * @param message detail message.
019   */
020  public AccessDeniedException(String message) {
021    super(message);
022  }
023
024  /**
025   * Creates an instance with a detail message and cause.
026   *
027   * @param message detail message.
028   * @param cause underlying cause.
029   */
030  public AccessDeniedException(String message, Throwable cause) {
031    super(message, cause);
032  }
033
034  /**
035   * Creates an instance with a cause.
036   *
037   * @param cause underlying cause.
038   */
039  public AccessDeniedException(Throwable cause) {
040    super(cause);
041  }
042}
